summary: Website project with logo-themed design. User wants service images used in the service section, a blue crystal and moon logo integrated to beautify service section images, and the entire website styled to match the logo's color theme.
architectural_notes: Website theme should be based on the blue crystal and moon logo colors
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Service card banner for Mini Readings — blue crescent moon and crystal cluster illustration with sparkle stars on a cream background, pentacle hand motif in the corner, blue line-art style (service-mini-readings-banner.dim_800x500.png)
- Service card banner for Love & Relationship Readings — blue crescent moon and crystal cluster illustration with sparkle stars and rose-pink accent on a cream background, pentacle hand motif in the corner, blue line-art style (service-love-relationship-banner.dim_800x500.png)
- Service card banner for Career / Money / Life — blue crescent moon and crystal cluster illustration with sparkle stars and amber accent on a cream background, pentacle hand motif in the corner, blue line-art style (service-career-money-life-banner.dim_800x500.png)
- Service card banner for Deep & Detailed Readings — blue crescent moon and crystal cluster illustration with sparkle stars and golden accent on a cream background, pentacle hand motif in the corner, blue line-art style (service-deep-detailed-banner.dim_800x500.png)
- Service card banner for Premium / Exclusive — blue crescent moon and crystal cluster illustration with sparkle stars and flame-orange accent on a cream background, pentacle hand motif in the corner, blue line-art style (service-premium-exclusive-banner.dim_800x500.png)

existing_features.title: Generate polished service card banner images for each service category using the uploaded service images (Mini Readings, Love & Relationship Readings, Career/Money/Life, Deep & Detailed Readings, Premium/Exclusive) and incorporate logo elements (blue crescent moon, crystals, sparkle stars, botanical leaves) as decorative overlays to beautify each card. Save them as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/ and display them in the Services section as the visual header/illustration for each service package card.

Retheme the entire website to match the logo's color palette: primary steel blue (#2b7ab5 / similar), cream/off-white background (#f5f0ea), soft peach/rose accent for sparkles, and deep navy for text. Update all CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css, Tailwind config tokens (mystic colors), gradient backgrounds in App.tsx, Hero, Header, Services, About, Footer, ProductCatalog, Reviews, and all other section components to reflect this blue-crystal-moon color scheme consistently throughout.

Update the ServicesGallery component (frontend/src/components/ServicesGallery.tsx) and serviceGalleryImages data (frontend/src/data/serviceGalleryImages.ts) to use the newly generated service category images from frontend/public/assets/generated/ instead of placeholder paths, mapping each image to its correct service category label.

new_feature_requests.summary: Use uploaded service images in the service section
Use blue crystal and moon logo to beautify service section images
Apply logo color theme (blue, crystal, moon) across the entire website
